overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia running through a dark, foggy swamp forest at night. The character moves continuously from a dense wooded path lined with wooden fence posts into an open marshy area under stormy skies, with a large rock formation visible in the final moments.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with wooden fence posts

agents.ego_description: Geralt running steadily along the narrow forest path, two swords strapped to his back swaying with the motion

entered.detail: weathered wooden posts lining the left side of the forest path
tall leafless trees with bare branches creating a dense canopy
narrow winding dirt trail through the swamp forest
dark teal storm clouds visible through gaps in the tree canopy

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt running through a narrow, enclosed forest path. Wooden fence posts line the left side while dead trees create dense walls on both sides. The ground is a dirt trail, and the stormy night sky is barely visible through the canopy above.

scene_state.functional_zone: open marshy wetland transitioning from dense forest

events.description: exits dense forest tree line into open marshland as wooden fence posts disappear

agents.ego_description: maintaining running pace as the environment opens up to reveal the stormy sky above

entered.detail: open grassy wetland replacing the narrow dirt path
thick fog hovering over the distant marsh horizon

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up into a wide marshy area. The wooden fence posts disappear behind as the path becomes grassy wetland. Dead trees now only appear on the left side in the distance, while the full stormy sky becomes visible overhead with fog banks in the far distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open swamp field with scattered rock formations

events.description: large moss-covered rock formation becomes visible on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: running across the open marsh toward a distant landmark on the horizon

entered.detail: large mossy boulder or rock outcrop emerging from the marsh grass
dark silhouette of a distant hill or large structure barely visible through fog

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt running through the wide open marsh. A large rock formation appears on the right side, and a distant hill or structure is visible ahead through the fog. The dead trees have faded to the far left distance while dark storm clouds dominate the sky above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt runs from a claustrophobic, wooded trail into a vast, storm-swept marshland. It begins on a narrow dirt path enclosed by dead trees and wooden fence posts that wall in the character under a barely visible night sky. As the terrain opens up, the fence posts vanish and the dense forest gives way to a wide, grassy wetland where the full expanse of the stormy sky and distant fog banks emerge overhead. The scene then expands further into the open marsh, with the dead trees receding into the far distance while a large rock formation appears on the right. Finally, the camera pushes forward through the wetlands toward a distant hill visible through the haze under a canopy of dark storm clouds.
